Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new Database\('./data.sqlite'\); try { const r = db.prepare\('INSERT INTO line_style_categories \(line_id, name, sort_order\) VALUES \(?, ?, ?\)'\).run\(1, 'T恤类', 1\); console.log\('OK:', r\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Error:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const b=fs.readFileSync\('C:/temp/test_export.xlsx'\); const base64=b.toString\('base64'\); const http=require\('http'\); const data=JSON.stringify\({file:base64}\); const req=http.request\({hostname:'localhost',port:3001,path:'/api/sewing-workshop-tree/import',method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Content-Length':Buffer.byteLength\(data\)}},res=>{let d='';res.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);res.on\('end',\(\)=>console.log\(d\)\);}\); req.write\(data\); req.end\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new Database\('./data.sqlite'\); const ins=db.prepare\('INSERT INTO line_style_categories \(line_id, name, sort_order\) VALUES \(?, ?, ?\)'\); ins.run\(1, 'T恤类', 1\); ins.run\(1, '卫衣类', 2\); ins.run\(2, '裤类', 1\); console.log\('Inserted 3 categories'\); const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM line_style_categories'\).all\(\); rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.id, r.line_id, r.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new Database\('./data.sqlite'\); const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM workshops'\).all\(\); rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.id, r.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new Database\('./data.sqlite'\); db.prepare\('UPDATE workshops SET name = ? WHERE id = ?'\).run\('一车间', 1\); console.log\('Fixed. Now:', db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM workshops'\).all\(\).map\(r=>r.id+':'+r.name\).join\(', '\)\);")
